variants.title: SCEMQA 开放题
variants.rewritten_question_text: A basketball team has the following heights and weights. What is the height for the 25th percentile? (Final Answer is a value)
variants.expected_answer: \answer{69.5} The height for the 25th percentile is the same as the first quartile. That is 69.5, the median from the lower half of the data
